title: ci target diverges from actual CI pipeline — missing fmt-check and cover-check
context: Actual CI pipeline runs: fmt-check lint test cover-check. The local ci target skips fmt-check and cover-check, so developers can push code that will fail CI.
expected_feedback: ci target must mirror CI pipeline exactly; add fmt-check and cover-check to match actual pipeline
coverage_rules: diverges from the actual CI pipeline
